description: 1. Suits adults of any age as one size fits all2. Composition is 100% silicone3. Very flexible, non-absorbent material4. 100% protection of your hair while swimming5. Chlorine-resistant siliconeMade out of silicone, this swimming cap is slick Fit. Its non-absorbent material is ideal for swimmers with long or short hair. The bright pink colour adds that extra glam quotient to the swimmer for sure!Caution: Keep away from sharp edges.
